ddls:
CREATE TABLE "file_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file event */,
  "source_file" TEXT /* Path to the source file */,
  "local_path" TEXT /* Local path where the file is stored */,
  "arguments" TEXT /* Arguments passed to the file */,
  "source_create_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source file was created */,
  "source_modify_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source file was last modified */,
  "source_access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source file was last accessed */,
  "target_create_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target file was created */,
  "target_modify_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target file was last modified */,
  "target_access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target file was last accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of file event (e.g., creation, modification, access) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file metadata entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file event associated with this metadata */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .lnk, .exe) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions set for the file */,
  "file_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the file */,
  "file_system" TEXT /* File system where the file is stored */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the file system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_metadata_file_type FOREIGN KEY ("file_type") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_metadata_file_system FOREIGN KEY ("file_system") REFERENCES file_systems ("file_system_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file event that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of security alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to investigate the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES file_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_systems" (
  "file_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file system */,
  "file_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the file system */,
  "file_system_type" TEXT /* Type of the file system (e.g., NTFS, HFS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type */,
  "file_type_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
